creator: tilghman@meg.abyt.es
text:
After installing the zabbix2-frontend, I discovered (through using the web interface configuration tool) that it requires the php5-gettext port, which was not installed as a dependency.

Fix: 

Add php5-gettext to the list of port dependencies for the zabbix2-frontend port.
How-To-Repeat: Install port, configure webserver, point browser at vhost hosting the zabbix2 server, view the list of problems.
